audit_items.proof_trace: q6asm_stream_remove_initial_silence (L1366-1373) makes no allocations itself — it is a pure wrapper delegating to q6asm_stream_remove_silence. In that helper, the single kzalloc (L1346) is followed by an unconditional kfree(pkt) at L1361 with no early-return branches between them regardless of apr_send_pkt success or failure. All paths free the allocation.
